title: 📋 Operator Checklist - Live Pipeline
text:
📋 Live Pipeline Operator Checklist
    Follow this sequence for tonight's Løgtingval live run
    
      
    
  
  
  
  
    🔍 Pre-Launch Verification (Before 20:00)
    
      
      
        
        
          CRITICALConfirm Model State
          Verify 2D model is active and ready. Check r_hat < 1.02 and ESS > 400.
          python -m freedom_nowcast.runner.cli phase3 validate-gates
        
      
      
      
        
        
          CRITICALVerify Live Data Source
          Confirm KVF lv26 endpoint is responsive and returning ballot data.
          curl -s https://kvf.fo/lv26 | head -n 50
        
      
      
      
        
        
          CRITICALCheck Effective Configuration
          Verify kvf_fv26_url is set to https://kvf.fo/lv26 and stan_offline_model_path points to 2D.
          python -c "from freedom_nowcast.config import get_settings; s=get_settings(); print(f'URL: {s.kvf_fv26_url}, Model: {s.stan_offline_model_path}')"
        
      
      
      
        
        
          IMPORTANTReview Gate Failures
          2D has strict gate failures (r_hat 1.01393, coverage 0.514). This is expected. Per ship note: "GO for controlled 2D with caveat-driven confidence gating."
          View: reports/ship_note_2d_20260326.md
        
      
      
      
        
        
          OPTIONALPrepare Turnout Overrides
          If radio announces specific municipality/site turnout, load into config/live_turnout_overrides.csv (columns: scope, name, turnout_votes, turnout_percent). Both municipality and site-level overrides are supported.
          Edit: config/live_turnout_overrides.csv
        
      
      
    
  
  
  
  
    ⚡ During Election Night (20:00 - Close)
    
      
      
        
        
          EVERY ~5 MINFetch Live Data (Phase 1)
          Pulls latest ballot snapshot from KVF lv26 endpoint. Updates stream tables only (fast path, ~30 seconds).
          python -m freedom_nowcast.runner.cli phase1 ingest-live-fast
        
      
      
      
        
        
          AFTER INGESTRun Model (Phase 4)
          Executes online particle filter with latest ballot data. Generates predictive nowcast and confidence intervals.
          python -m freedom_nowcast.runner.cli phase4 run --election-family logtingsval
        
      
      
      
        
        
          AFTER RUNUpdate Dashboard (Phase 4)
          Rebuilds JSON payload and HTML pages. Pushes updates to public site.
          python -m freedom_nowcast.runner.cli phase4 dashboard-data
        
      
      
      
        
        
          IF NEEDEDApply Turnout Override
          When radio announces official turnout or specific site data: add row to config/live_turnout_overrides.csv and re-run phase4.
          Add row + rerun: python -m freedom_nowcast.runner.cli phase4 run --election-family logtingsval
        
      
      
      
        
        
          MONITORWatch Confidence Intervals
          As more data comes in, confidence bands should narrow. Check nowcast page for convergence. If margins stay very wide (>5%), monitor model state.
          Browse: https://[public-site]/nowcast.html
        
      
      
    
  
  
  
  
    🔧 Manual Turnout Override Guide
    
      
      
        ✓ Supported Override Scopes:
        • municipality - Apply turnout to entire municipality (e.g., "Torshavn", "Klaksvik")
        • site - Apply turnout to specific polling location (e.g., site IDs like "1001", "1002")
      
      
      
        ✓ CSV Format (config/live_turnout_overrides.csv):
        scope,name,turnout_votes,turnout_percent
        • Fill turnout_votes if you have absolute count
        • Fill turnout_percent if you have percentage only
        • Leave blank if not known (system infers from available data)
      
      
      
        Example Entries:
        municipality,Klaksvik,2887, (Klaksvik: 2,887 votes, % inferred)
        municipality,Runavik,,77.2 (Runavik: 77.2% turnout, votes inferred)
        site,1045,,68.5 (Site 1045: 68.5% turnout)
      
      
    
  
  
  
  
    📊 Post-Night Wrap-up
    
      
      
        
        
          Archive Final Nowcast
          Save final HTML snapshots and payload for post-mortems.
          cp docs/dashboard/data/dashboard_payload.json reports/final_payload_lv26.json
        
      
      
      
        
        
          Review Model Diagnostics
          Check for divergences or pathologies in final night run.
          View: reports/model_convergence_report.json
        
      
      
      
        
        
          Commit and Document
          Record turnout overrides and final state for next cycle.
          git add config/live_turnout_overrides.csv && git commit -m "Final LV26 turnout overrides $(date +%Y%m%d)"
        
      
      
    
  
  
  
  
    🧠 Model Status Summary
    
      
      
        
        
          Model: 2D Latent Structure
          File: stan/offline_nowcast_2d.stan
          Status: ✓ Operational
          Frozen: artifacts/ship_2d_20260326_194752
        
        
        
          Live Source: https://kvf.fo/lv26
          Pipeline: phase1 → phase4 cadence
          Polls Policy: Diagnostics-only
          Readiness: GO (with caveats)
        
        
      
      
      
        ⚠️  Operational Caveat: National electorate undercoverage exists. 
        Confidence must be gated on high-impact-site inclusion and weighted completeness, not site count alone. 
        Monitor confidence intervals throughout the night.
      
      
    
  
  
  
    Generated: 2026-03-26 | Model: 2D | Source: lv26 | Confidence: Caveat-Driven | 
    Ship Note

title: Yvirlit
text:
Síðurnar tú skalt brúka



Núverandi meting


Flokkar, sessir og framgongd í uppteljing beint nú.

 

Diagnostikkur


Gate-støða, konvergens og ppc-viðurskifti.

 

Dátugrunnur


Talvur, konsistensfløgg og mapping-yvirlit.

 

Endurspæl


Samanbering við søgulig valkvøld.

 

Veljarakanningar


Seinastu kanningar, skiftað eftir valfamilju og flokki.
